document_id.description: ID of the document to update

operations.description:
List of operation dicts. Each operation MUST have a 'type' field.
        All operations accept an optional 'tab_id' to target a specific tab.

bold.description: Whether to make text bold (True/False/None to leave unchanged)

clear_link.description: Remove hyperlink from the target range

document_id.description: ID of the document to update

end_index.description: End position for text replacement/formatting (if not provided with text, text is inserted)

end_of_segment.description: Insert text at the end of the targeted segment instead of start_index

font_weight.description: Font weight (100-900 in steps of 100; requires font_family)

italic.description: Whether to make text italic (True/False/None to leave unchanged)

segment_id.description: Optional header/footer/footnote segment ID to target

start_index.description:
Start position for operation using Docs API indices from
inspect_doc_structure. For the main body, 0 is also accepted as an
alias for the first writable position.

strikethrough.description: Whether to strike through text (True/False/None to leave unchanged)

tab_id.description: Optional document tab ID to target

text.description: New text to insert or replace with (optional - can format existing text without changing it)

underline.description: Whether to underline text (True/False/None to leave unchanged)
